zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Lydia Appleford於1499年出生在英國英格蘭布里斯托布利斯林頓時，她的父親Richard Appleforde19歲，母親Mary Margaret18歲。她於大約1512年與Ralph Edward Mylles在英國巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1579年9月3日在英國英格蘭希迪 本 倫敦享年80歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭希迪 本 倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Lydia Appleford于1499年出生在英国英格兰布里斯托布利斯林頓时，她的父亲Richard Appleforde19岁，母亲Mary Margaret18岁。她于大约1512年与Ralph Edward Mylles在英国巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1579年9月3日在英国英格兰希迪 本 倫敦享年80岁，埋葬在英国英格兰希迪 本 倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Appleford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Appleford (Berkshire), which was named in Old English with æppel ‘apple’ + ford ‘ford’.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

nameMeanings.name: Lydia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Greek origin, meaning ‘woman from Lydia’, an area of Asia Minor. The name is borne in the Bible by a woman of Thyatira who was converted by St Paul and who entertained him in her house (Acts 16:14–15, 40). It has enjoyed steady popularity in the English-speaking world since the 17th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Lydia Appleford was born in 1499, in Brislington, Bristol, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard Appleforde, was 19 and her mother, Mary Margaret, was 18. She married Ralph Edward Mylles about 1512, in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 3 September 1579, in City of London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 80, and was buried in City of London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Lydia Appleford est née en 1499, à Brislington, Bristol, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Appleforde, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Mary Margaret, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph Edward Mylles environ 1512, à Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 septembre 1579, à City of London, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterrée à City of London, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Saint Michaels, Cornhill, City of London: City of London, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Lydia Appleford 1499 in Brislington, Bristol, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Appleforde 19 und ihre Mutter Mary Margaret 18. Sie hat um 1512 in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England Ralph Edward Mylles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. September 1579 im Alter von 80 Jahren in City of London, England, United Kingdom und wurde in City of London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Lydia Appleford è nata il nel 1499 nel Brislington, Bristol, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Richard Appleforde, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Mary Margaret, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Ralph Edward Mylles circa 1512, nel Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 3 settembre 1579, nel City of London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolta a City of London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Lydia Applefordが1499年にイギリスイギリスブリストルブリスリントンで生まれた時，父Richard Applefordeは19歳，母Mary Margaretは18歳であった。約1512年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイメルシャムでRalph Edward Myllesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1579年9月3日にイギリスイギリスシトイ オフ ロンドンで80歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシトイ オフ ロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Lydia Appleford(이)가 1499년 영국 잉글랜드 브리스톨 브리슬링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Appleforde(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Margaret(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 대략 1512년 영국 벅잉함실르 어머샤에서 Ralph Edward Mylles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1579년 9월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 시티 프 런던에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 시티 프 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.Saint Michaels, Cornhill, City of London: City of London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Lydia Appleford nasceu em 1499, em Brislington, Bristol, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Appleforde, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Mary Margaret, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph Edward Mylles aproximadamente 1512, em Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de setembro de 1579, em City of London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 80 anos, e foi sepultada em City of London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Saint Michaels, Cornhill, City of London: City of London, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Lydia Appleford родилась в 1499 г. в местности брислингтон, бристол, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard Appleforde было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Margaret, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph Edward Mylles около 1512 г. в местности амиршам, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 3 сентября 1579 г. в местности сити оф лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет и была похоронена в местности сити оф лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Lydia Appleford nació en 1499, en Brislington, Bristol, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Appleforde, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Mary Margaret, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Ralph Edward Mylles aproximadamente 1512, en Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 3 de septiembre de 1579, en City of London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultada en City of London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
